# Titan Machining LLC

> Titan Machining LLC is a precision lathe and CNC machining company based in Ajman, United Arab Emirates, serving industrial, oil & gas, manufacturing, construction, marine, and general engineering clients across the UAE.

Titan Machining LLC specializes in lathe works and turning, CNC milling, custom fabrication, welding and assembly, quality inspection, and spare parts reproduction. The team combines skilled, hands-on machinists with modern equipment to deliver precision components — from one-off prototypes to full production runs — with accurate timelines and consistent quality.

## Pages

- [Home](https://titanmachininguae.com/): Overview of Titan Machining LLC's precision lathe and CNC machining services in the UAE.
- [Services](https://titanmachininguae.com/services/): Full breakdown of machining capabilities including lathe works, CNC milling, custom fabrication, welding & assembly, quality inspection, spare parts reproduction, and batch production runs.
- [About](https://titanmachininguae.com/about/): Company background, values, and approach to precision machining.
- [Contact](https://titanmachininguae.com/contact/): Contact details and quote request form.
